title: PlayStation Plus Subscribers Cancel Memberships Over Digital-Only Controversy, But Analysts Say GTA 6 Launch Won't Be Impacted
summary: PlayStation 5 owners are canceling their PlayStation Plus subscriptions to protest Sony's decision to stop producing physical discs for games starting in 2028. However, industry analysts estimate the vocal protesters represent only about 15 percent of the user base, and believe GTA 6's November 19 launch will proceed unaffected despite the backlash.

title: Actress Inde Navarrette Confirms Plans to Play GTA 6 on Day One
summary: Obsession star Inde Navarrette revealed her gaming credentials, noting she built her own PC and streamed on Twitch. She confirmed plans to play Grand Theft Auto VI on its November 19 launch day.

title: Sony Offers 50% PlayStation Plus Discounts to Retain Subscribers Canceling Over Physical Media Controversy
summary: Sony has begun offering discounts of up to 50 percent on PlayStation Plus subscriptions to players who recently canceled their memberships in protest of the company's decision to end physical game support. The retention offers include three months of PS Plus Extra at half price or 25 percent off the Premium tier for a year.

title: Target Offering 20% Student and Teacher Discount on GTA 6 Pre-Orders
summary: Verified students and teachers can now receive a 20 percent discount on Grand Theft Auto 6 Standard Edition pre-orders at Target. The discount reduces the standard $79.99 price to approximately $60.

title: Dutch Lawsuit Warns Sony Could Control GTA 6 Pricing Without Physical Market Competition
summary: A Dutch legal complaint cautions that Sony could have unprecedented control over pricing for games like Grand Theft Auto VI once physical discs are eliminated. Without a used game market or retailer competition, Sony would have greater ability to set prices unilaterally.
